title: Let Me Teleport
description: A simple mod to stop your server from complaining about players moving too quickly when they get teleported.
body:
[![Discord](https://discordapp.com/api/guilds/959153592869224579/widget.png?style=banner2)](https://discord.gg/qpc69BUeDe)

A simple mod that fixes the "*player* moved too quickly!" messages that are spammed in the console when the server tells a player to teleport more than ~100 blocks, whether by command or switching dimensions. It appears that Mojang tried to fix this, but they implemented their fix incorrectly and it does not work; this mod essentially fixes their broken fix.\
Fixes [MC-248231](https://bugs.mojang.com/browse/MC-248231).
